hooks.command: dir="$(dirname "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH")"; while [[ ! -f "$dir/package.json" ]] && [[ "$dir" != "/" ]]; do dir="$(dirname "$dir")"; done; [[ -f "$dir/package.json" ]] && cd "$dir" && pnpm exec prettier --write --log-level warn "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(js|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then dir="$(dirname "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH")"; while [[ ! -f "$dir/package.json" ]] && [[ "$dir" != "/" ]]; do dir="$(dirname "$dir")"; done; [[ -f "$dir/package.json" ]] && cd "$dir" && pnpm exec eslint --cache --cache-location ./node_modules/.cache/eslint --fix --max-warnings 0 "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *".env"* ]]; then echo 'Editing .env files is not allowed. Ask the user to update environment variables manually.' && exit 2; fi
